title: Enterprise - MaiStorage
text:
Enterprise - MaiStorage
Skip to content
Reselling Storage Solutions from a True Technology Partner
MaiStorage, powered by Phison’s IP portfolio, provides highly customized and off-the-shelf solutions to address specific storage deployment scenarios and workloads. MaiStorage helps customers to identify and make the most of emerging opportunities across the data storage ecosystem, while positioning them for future growth.
A True Technology Partner
For over two decades, Phison has been at the forefront of innovation. It has led the data storage industry as a true technology partner, engineering custom storage solutions and powerful SSD products.
MaiStorage, powered by Phison, plays a direct role in the development of powerful, efficient and reliable off-the-shelf MaiStorage Enterprise SSD products that are also customizable to your needs. MaiStorage solutions empower you not only to tackle today’s engineering challenges, but also to seamlessly scale for future growth.
Discover how these finely tuned data ecosystem solutions are designed to meet enterprise standards for performance, efficiency and reliability, and learn more about how they can help you get to market faster.
Performance X-Series
MaiStorage’s highest performance enterprise-class SSDs are designed for extreme write intensity, with vast capacity options allowing for scale and efficiency while reducing operating costs.
MaiStorage
Enterprise
X-Series SSDs come in the latest form factors and are unmatched in terms of features, combining custom SSD results with an off-the-shelf buying experience.
Seamlessly scale to meet demand
Maintain a competitive edge by adapting to changing conditions easily
Reduce your OpEx
View Products
Data Center D-Series
Contemporary data center design utilizes a diverse array of storage form factors optimized to meet specific capacity, performance and feature needs.
MaiStorage
Enterprise
D-Series SSDs are compatible with industry standards and custom data center servers, enabling you to accommodate the increasing volume of data generated by contemporary applications and users with reduced power consumption.
Meet the performance demands of the most challenging workloads, at scale
Run operations in a more cost- and energy-efficient way
Reduce your impact on the environment
View Products
Boot Drive B-Series
Server performance starts at the core where applications and background tasks reside.
MaiStorage
Enterprise
B-Series boot drives are designed for reliability and I/O consistency ensuring optimal results even in high-volume rack scale environments.
Ensure your operations go uninterrupted
Minimize the risk of failure or data corruption
Enjoy the ultimate peace of mind that MaiStorage reliability provides
View Products
SATA S-Series
Efficiently manage the power consumption of your legacy servers with high-performance and large capacity
MaiStorage
Enterprise
SATA S-Series SSDs designed to extend the life and capabilities of your existing servers without a complete overhaul of your existing infrastructure.
Reduce energy costs and environmental impact in legacy infrastructure
Maximize power efficiency against performance and capacity
Cut CapEx by avoiding the purchase of new servers
View Products
aiDAPTIV+ | AI-Series
MaiStorage, powered by Phison, is helping to pioneer the artificial intelligence industry with the first all-inclusive solution to fine tune language models larger than the GPU memory barrier. This hybrid solution takes advantage of MaiStorage’s expansive NAND knowledge to enable extreme endurance SSDs, controlled by aiDAPTIVLink to segment data and direct data to GPUs for processing.
Scale boundaries, not budgets
Empower business with more precise large language model fine tuning
Seamless integration with PyTorch
Find Out More
